title: × dactyleucorchis bruniana
intro: × Dactyleucorchis bruniana, also known as the hybrid of Dactylorhiza maculata and Leucorchis gracilis, is a rare and unique orchid species found in the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional European folk medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of × Dactyleucorchis bruniana include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing pain and swelling. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be dried and used as a powder or capsule in modern herbal supplements.
